context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly rewrites a technical incident post-mortem for a non-technical executive audience following the plain-english workflow.

checklist.name: Audience explicitly identified
checklist.description: Response identifies or acknowledges the audience as executive (CEO/CFO) before or at the start of the rewrite.

checklist.name: Key message leads the opening paragraph
checklist.description: Opening paragraph states what happened, the business impact, and what decision or action is needed — not background context.

checklist.name: Technical jargon translated or removed
checklist.description: All technical terms (Nginx, Kubernetes, ConfigMap, OPA Gatekeeper, IaC) are replaced with plain-language equivalents or removed entirely.

checklist.name: Acronyms defined on first use
checklist.description: Any acronyms retained in the rewrite (e.g., API, UTC, MTTR) are defined inline on their first occurrence.

checklist.name: Decision not buried
checklist.description: The budget request or recommendation is not buried after multiple paragraphs of technical background.
